workflow.name: Create a Pickup/Collectible System
workflow.description: Build a reusable pickup actor Blueprint with overlap detection, collection feedback (sound + VFX), respawn timer, and score tracking via Game Mode.
prerequisites: A mesh for the pickup item
An open UE project with a level and Game Mode

steps.purpose: Spawn an Empty Actor as the pickup base
Add a StaticMeshComponent for the pickup visual
Add a SphereCollision component for overlap detection
Set collision to OverlapAllDynamic, mesh to rotate slowly
Add DestroyActor or SetActorHiddenInGame for collection
Add a SetTimerByFunctionName for respawn delay

workflow.expectedOutcome: A reusable pickup Blueprint that detects player overlap, plays collection feedback, and optionally respawns after a delay

readme: Duplicate the pickup Blueprint and change the mesh/sound for different item types (health, ammo, coins). Connect to your Game Mode for score tracking.
